SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality

Packages that use io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality
Package
Description
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality
Functionality interfaces and implementations that attach pagination and navigation behaviour to CMS content components such as search, browse, TOC, and bookmark views.
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages
Core CMS page model including the CMSPage entity, page templates, the template manager, publication status, and edit-state tracking for the page authoring workflow.
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages.content.types
Concrete CMS content type implementations, each representing a distinct kind of embeddable content block such as search, browse, media, metadata display, record lists, or maps.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality used by io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality
    Class
    Description
    Functionality
    Marker interface for CMS component functionality objects that are aware of a current page number.
    SearchFunctionality
    CMS item functionality that embeds a search interface with its own query and facet state.
    TocFunctionality
    CMS item functionality that displays a table of contents for a specified record.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality used by io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages
    Class
    Description
    SearchFunctionality
    CMS item functionality that embeds a search interface with its own query and facet state.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality used by io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages.content.types
    Class
    Description
    BrowseFunctionality
     
    Functionality
    Marker interface for CMS component functionality objects that are aware of a current page number.
    SearchFunctionality
    CMS item functionality that embeds a search interface with its own query and facet state.
